text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Mentoring Programs * Disabilities Issues 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disabilities Issues Homeless Youth LGBTQ2+ Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK BEND OFFICE DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides educational parenting support, family support group sessions, education and mentoring support, and referral to other resources as needed. This empowers individuals with disabilities, and their families, to take charge of their life's direction. Also assists in determining supports, goals, and community inclusion, resulting in increased independence. 2525 NE Twin Knolls Drive Suite 7 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Families and children with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 548-8559 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK CENTRAL OREGON DISABILITY SUPPORT NETWORK KLAMATH FALLS OFFICE DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides educational parenting support, family support group sessions, education and mentoring support, and referral to other resources as needed.
